name: TidyMark
desc: TidyMark — Chrome/Edge 书签管理扩展 备份书签、一键整理分类，支持 AI 辅助优化；扫描失效书签，自动归档不常用书签，并提供新标签页导航和访问热度统计。& TidyMark — Chrome/Edge Bookmark Manager Backup and organize bookmarks …
descFull: TidyMark — Chrome/Edge 书签管理扩展 备份书签、一键整理分类，支持 AI 辅助优化；扫描失效书签，自动归档不常用书签，并提供新标签页导航和访问热度统计。& TidyMark — Chrome/Edge Bookmark Manager Backup and organize bookmarks with one-click auto categorization and optional AI assistance. Detect broken bookmarks, auto-archive infrequently used ones, and enjoy New Tab navigation with access stats.
